# 🗺️ Roadmap

This document outlines the planned features and improvements for Copilot Handoff.

## Current Version: 0.1.0

✅ Core session tracking  
✅ Smart notifications  
✅ Context export system  
✅ Status bar integration  
✅ Configurable settings  

---

## 📅 Upcoming Releases

### Version 0.2.0 - Enhanced Context Export
**Estimated: Q1 2026**

- [ ] Customizable export templates
- [ ] Export history tracking
- [ ] Quick export from status bar
- [ ] Export format preferences (JSON, plain text)
- [ ] Auto-export on threshold

### Version 0.3.0 - Direct Copilot Integration
**Estimated: Q2 2026**

- [ ] Direct Copilot Chat API integration
- [ ] Per-chat-session tracking (when API available)
- [ ] Chat participant detection
- [ ] Session metadata in exports

### Version 0.4.0 - Team Features
**Estimated: Q2 2026**

- [ ] Shared session insights
- [ ] Team handoff templates
- [ ] Export sharing capabilities
- [ ] Collaboration statistics

### Version 1.0.0 - Stable Release
**Estimated: Q3 2026**

- [ ] All core features stable
- [ ] Comprehensive documentation
- [ ] Video tutorials
- [ ] Multi-language support
- [ ] Performance optimizations

---

## 💡 Future Ideas

These features are under consideration but not yet scheduled:

### Analytics & Insights
- Session duration analytics dashboard
- Usage patterns and trends
- Productivity metrics
- Best practices suggestions

### Advanced Features
- AI-powered handoff recommendations
- Smart context summarization
- Integration with other AI tools
- Custom notification rules
- Keyboard shortcuts

### Platform Support
- VS Code for Web support
- VS Codespaces integration
- Remote development improvements

---

## 🗳️ Community Input

We want to hear from you! Vote on features:

1. Check [open feature requests](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3Aenhancement)
2. 👍 Vote on features you'd like to see
3. 💬 Comment with your use cases
4. 🆕 [Suggest new features](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)

---

## 🚀 How to Contribute

Want to help build these features?

1. Check the [good first issue](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff/labels/good%20first%20issue) label
2. Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
3. Join [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff/discussions)
4. Submit a Pull Request

---

## 📝 Notes

- Timelines are estimates and subject to change
- Features depend on VS Code API availability
- Community feedback influences priorities
- Security and stability are top priorities

**Last Updated:** January 26, 2026
